title: 4Pack Thick 304 Stainless Steel Bowls, Small Double Wall Rice Bowl, Stainless Steel Soup Bowl, Metal Bowls for Salad Fruit Cereal Noodle (Gold, 12cm)
features: 【THICK SUS304 STAINLESS STEEL】Thickened SUS304 stainless steel material, resistant to wear and fall, not easy to deform, not easy to rust. Exquisite drawing process, not easy to scratch. The edges of stainless steel serving bowl are smooth and does not scratch your mouth.

【DOUBLE WALL】Double wall hollow design of stainless steel rice bowl, with heat insulation effect, no need to worry about hot soup and hot dishes will hurt your hands; Lock the temperature, the food is not easy to be cold, and warm food is more delicious.

【EASY TO CLEAN】Large opening design of stainless steel soup bowl makes it more convenient to serve meals. At the same time, it is very easy to clean. When cleaning, do not use hard objects such as steel wire balls to clean. Dishwasher safe.

【SERVING DIFFERENT FOODS】This set contains 4 stainless steel bowl. The size is 4.7in/12cm (diameter) x 2.4 in/6.2cm(height). This delicate small bowl can be used as soup bowl, cooked food bowl, salads bowl, fruit bowl, noodle bowl, cereal bowl, rice bowl, ice cream bowl, kids snacks bowl, dessert bowl, dip bowl.

【INTIMATE GIFTS】When you have friends or relatives moving in, this exquisite set of serving salad/ soup dish bowl will be your ideal gift, and they will be pleased because of its sturdiness and exquisiteness!
description: When your child often breaks glass bowls or ceramic bowls, you can consider choosing a stainless steel bowl that is not broken, so that you don't have to worry about the debris hurting your child. PRODUCT FEATURES ◆【STRUDY AND DURABLE】These 4 delicate small kid bowls are made of thick 304 stainless steel, sturdy and durable, anti-wear, anti-drop, and long service life. Rounded corners, use it without hurting your mouth. ◆【KEEP WARM】the double-layer hollow design can lock the temperature better than the single-layer bowl, and the warm food is more delicious. ◆【NO HOT IN YOUR HANDS】Double-layer hollow design, the bowl will not be hot when holding it in your hand, and it is very safe for children to use. ◆【EXQUISITE AND BEAUTIFUL】unique drawing process, suitable size, which fits the palm of your hand perfectly, can be used to hold a variety of different foods. You can use it as meal prep bowl, sauces bowl,seasoning bowl, appetizer bowl, kimchi bowl. PRODUCT PARAMETER ●Color: Gold ●Size: 4.7in/12cm (diameter) x 2.4 in/6.2cm(height) ●Quantity:4 pcs
